_comment: Descriptions of external/other skills referenced as negative-trigger owners, so Tier 2 routing can rank our skills against real competitors. Paraphrased from each skill's own description; update if the upstream description changes.

competitors.web-quality-skills:accessibility: Audit and improve web accessibility following WCAG 2.2 guidelines. Screen reader support, keyboard navigation, color contrast, ARIA, make accessible, a11y audit, WCAG compliance.
competitors.web-quality-skills:core-web-vitals: Optimize Core Web Vitals LCP INP CLS for better page experience and search ranking. Fix layout shifts, reduce input delay, largest contentful paint.
competitors.web-quality-skills:performance: Optimize web performance for faster loading and better user experience. Speed up my site, reduce load time, page speed, performance audit.
competitors.agent-skills:test-driven-development: Drive development with tests. Write failing tests, implement, verify. Prove that code works, bug report, red green refactor, TDD unit tests.
